SEARCH
程序包 AccountType

类 exampleCreator

java.lang.Object
AccountType.exampleCreator
public class exampleCreator extends Object
A utility class to create and manage examples of financial transactions for demonstration or testing purposes. This class simulates transactions like transfers, deposits, withdrawals, and tasks, and logs them into account files.

  • 构造器概要

  • 构造器详细资料

    • exampleCreator

      public exampleCreator()

  • 方法详细资料

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      The main method to generate transaction logs. It cycles through each year and month within a specified range, randomly generating transactions for a set number of days per month.
      参数:
      args - the input arguments (not used in this application)

    • setTransferLog

      public static void setTransferLog(String senderEmail, String senderAccountNumber, String receiverEmail, String receiverAccountNumber, double amount, String date)
      Logs a transfer transaction as both a sender and a receiver. This method logs the transaction in both the sender's and the receiver's account files.
      参数:
      senderEmail - the email of the account sending the funds
      senderAccountNumber - the account number of the sender
      receiverEmail - the email of the account receiving the funds
      receiverAccountNumber - the account number of the receiver
      amount - the transaction amount
      date - the date and time of the transaction formatted as a string

    • setParentSetBalanceLog

      public static void setParentSetBalanceLog(String ownerEmail, String ownerAccountNumber, double amount, String date)
      Set parent set balance log.
      参数:
      ownerEmail - the owner email
      ownerAccountNumber - the owner account number
      amount - the amount
      date - the date

    • setDepositLog

      public static void setDepositLog(String ownerEmail, String ownerAccountNumber, double amount, String date)
      Set deposit log.
      参数:
      ownerEmail - the owner email
      ownerAccountNumber - the owner account number
      amount - the amount
      date - the date

    • setWithdrawLog

      public static void setWithdrawLog(String ownerEmail, String ownerAccountNumber, double amount, String date)
      Set withdraw log.
      参数:
      ownerEmail - the owner email
      ownerAccountNumber - the owner account number
      amount - the amount
      date - the date

    • setTaskLog

      public static void setTaskLog(String ownerEmail, String ownerAccountNumber, String taskId, double amount, String date)
      Set task log.
      参数:
      ownerEmail - the owner email
      ownerAccountNumber - the owner account number
      taskId - the task id
      amount - the amount
      date - the date

    • appendTextToFile

      public static void appendTextToFile(String filePath, String textToAppend)
      Appends text to a specific position in a file or creates new content if the file is too short. This method reads all lines from the specified file, inserts the text at the second line position, and then writes back all the content to the file, effectively modifying the original file content.
      参数:
      filePath - the file path where the text is to be appended. This is the full path to the file.
